text: The level is just so advanced, the bezel is tiffin' and stabbed, don't grip on my hand Know that I came with the slide from left to right, but now I don't wanna dance I got too much on the line, too much on my mind, too much in, enough on my plans Nike don't claim me to tell you just do it

segments.text: The level is just so advanced, the bezel is tiffin' and stabbed, don't grip on my hand
Know that I came with the slide from left to right, but now I don't wanna dance
I got too much on the line, too much on my mind, too much in, enough on my plans
Nike don't claim me to tell you just do it
